description:
CLI tool to generate rust-deps.toml from Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock.

Similar to godeps-gen but for Rust:
- Parse Cargo.lock for dependency versions
- Prefetch crates from crates.io
- Output rust-deps.toml with Nix hashes

Usage: rustdeps-gen [--cargo-lock Cargo.lock] > rust-deps.toml
title: rustdeps-gen: Generate rust-deps.toml from Cargo.lock
